title: Odos Protocol to shut down, gives users until July 30 to withdraw assets
summary: Odos Protocol will shut down on July 30, giving users one week to withdraw assets. The team did not provide a reason for the decision.

title: RWAs become Hyperliquid’s largest trading category
summary: Tokenized RWA trading became Hyperliquid’s largest trading category for the first time, accounting for more than half of the decentralized exchange’s weekly trading volume.

title: Oil Tankers Run The Houthi Gauntlet to Keep Saudi Exports Flowing
summary: Attacks on ships by the Yemeni rebels have slowed but not stopped Red Sea oil shipments

title: Yen’s Worst Week Since May Brings It Close to 165 Versus Dollar
summary: The yen is on track for its biggest weekly loss in more than two months, with intervention warnings doing little to deter investors betting on further weakness.

title: Bitcoinist.App Brings Private Mining Pools to iOS
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoinist.App Brings Private Mining Pools to iOS
The only Bitcoin mining app on the Apple App Store that lets users create private pools, invite friends and family to combine hashpower, and compete with the global Bitcoin hashrate, while payouts go directly to wallets they control

title: Polymarket Account in Farage Backer's Name Took $9M in Crypto From Unknown Sources: FT
summary: The "GCottrell93" account bet the funds on Trump's election win and cashed out the profit, though who paid in and who collected is unclear.

title: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
summary: FLUX 3 is the German AI lab’s first video model, and the same system is already teaching robots to work an Audi assembly line.

title: Former bitcoin miner Poolin files Chapter 11, sets $52 million floor bid for Texas operations
summary: Poolin Technology filed for Chapter 11 with $173 million in claims, lining up a $52 million stalking-horse bid for its Texas mining assets.

title: The Largest Stablecoins Ranked
summary: In recent years, stablecoins have emerged as crypto’s breakout use case. Assets that were created to streamline cryptocurrency trading are now being recognized as a more efficient, flexible, transparent medium of exchange for the world financial system. title: US hits 60 countries with new duties as Trump rebuilds tariff wall
summary: Washington moves to reimpose 10 per cent duties after previous blanket levies were struck down by Supreme Court

title: The field marshal’s gambit
summary: Asim Munir is trying to refashion Pakistan’s place in the world — and bolster his power at home
